title: elymus arizonicus
intro: Elymus arizonicus, also known as Arizona wheatgrass or Arizona wildrye, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Elymus arizonicus has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
